description_long: This is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a slightly flattened top and bottom, featuring a rough, ribbed surface. Its skin is predominantly orange with patches of green and brown discoloration, giving it a weathered, natural appearance. The pumpkin has a short, dry, tan-colored stem at the top, which is slightly twisted and textured. The surface shows some dark spots and blemishes, suggesting age or exposure to the elements. There are no visible carvings, cutouts, or decorative accessories on its exterior. The pumpkin is resting on a plain, white background, with a few small, dark fragments nearby.
description: A round, orange pumpkin with green and brown patches, a rough ribbed surface, and a short tan stem. The skin appears weathered and uncarved.
description_view_0: The pumpkin is seen from a slightly angled side, showing the stem and prominent ribbing, with dark patches and a couple of small fragments on the ground.
description_view_1: This view highlights the smoother side of the pumpkin, with fewer blemishes and a clearer view of the stem's base.
description_view_2: The pumpkin appears more rounded from this angle, with the stem centered and a large dark patch visible near the bottom.
description_view_3: This side shows more pronounced ribbing and several dark spots, with additional fragments visible on the ground.
